About Me

Passionate about design, driven by results

Creating Visual Stories That Convert

I'm a Graphic Designer and Digital Marketing Executive with 1 year of hands-on experience crafting impactful visual designs and executing result-oriented digital marketing strategies.

My expertise spans social media marketing, branding, content creation, and visual communication — all backed by a strong understanding of audience engagement and brand growth.

Currently based in Chennai, I collaborate with teams and clients to deliver designs that don't just look good — they perform.
